```{r classification_prep}
# Goal: predict which listings will be discounted from initial price
# Business use: score inbound acquisition leads → high P(discount) = motivated seller
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

# ── 11A. Classification dataset ───────────────────────────
df_cls <- df_model |>
  filter(!is.na(discounted)) |>
  mutate(
    banos_miss = as.numeric(banos_miss),
    y01        = as.integer(discounted),
    discounted = factor(discounted, levels = c(FALSE, TRUE),
                        labels = c("No", "Yes"))
  )

set.seed(2025)
idx_cls   <- sample(nrow(df_cls), floor(0.75 * nrow(df_cls)))
train_cls <- df_cls[idx_cls, ]
test_cls  <- df_cls[-idx_cls, ]

cat(sprintf("Classification — Train: %d | Test: %d | Discount rate train: %.1f%%\n",
            nrow(train_cls), nrow(test_cls),
            100 * mean(train_cls$y01)))
```

```{r logit_formulas}
# ── 11B. Classification formulas ──────────────────────────
# Align levels for classification
shared_z_cls <- levels(factor(train_cls$zona))
test_cls <- test_cls |>
  filter(zona %in% shared_z_cls) |>
  mutate(zona = factor(zona, levels = shared_z_cls))

f_cls_fe   <- as.formula(paste("discounted ~ zona +", structural_rhs))
f_cls_fund <- as.formula(paste("discounted ~", structural_rhs, "+", district_rhs))

# ── 11C. Fit logit models ──────────────────────────────────
m_cls_fe   <- glm(f_cls_fe,   data = train_cls, family = binomial(link="logit"))
m_cls_fund <- glm(f_cls_fund, data = train_cls, family = binomial(link="logit"))

# Test set predictions
p_fe   <- predict(m_cls_fe,   newdata = test_cls, type = "response")
p_fund <- predict(m_cls_fund, newdata = test_cls, type = "response")

y_cls_test <- test_cls$y01
```

```{r classification_eval}
# ── 11D. Classification performance ───────────────────────
eval_cls <- function(probs, actuals, model_name, threshold = 0.5) {
  preds <- as.integer(probs >= threshold)
  tp    <- sum(preds == 1 & actuals == 1)
  tn    <- sum(preds == 0 & actuals == 0)
  fp    <- sum(preds == 1 & actuals == 0)
  fn    <- sum(preds == 0 & actuals == 1)
  tibble(
    Model       = model_name,
    AUC         = pROC::auc(pROC::roc(actuals, probs, quiet=TRUE)) |> as.numeric(),
    Accuracy    = (tp + tn) / length(actuals),
    Precision   = if_else(tp + fp > 0, tp / (tp + fp), NA_real_),
    Recall      = if_else(tp + fn > 0, tp / (tp + fn), NA_real_),
    F1          = if_else(!is.na(Precision) & !is.na(Recall),
                          2 * Precision * Recall / (Precision + Recall), NA_real_),
    `Brier Score` = mean((probs - actuals)^2)
  )
}

cls_perf <- bind_rows(
  eval_cls(p_fe,   y_cls_test, "FE Logit (zona + features)"),
  eval_cls(p_fund, y_cls_test, "Fundamentals Logit (district + features)")
)

cls_perf |>
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~round(.x, 4))) |>
  gt() |>
  tab_header(
    title    = md("**Discount Prediction — Classification Performance**"),
    subtitle = "Test set | Threshold = 0.50"
  ) |>
  data_color(columns = AUC, palette = c("#F8F0E3","#1B3A6B"), domain = c(0,1)) |>
  data_color(columns = F1,  palette = c("#F8F0E3","#52B788"), domain = c(0,1), na_color = "grey90")
```

```{r roc_curve, fig.width=11, fig.height=6}
# ── 11E. ROC curves (dual model) ──────────────────────────
roc_fe   <- pROC::roc(y_cls_test, p_fe,   quiet=TRUE)
roc_fund <- pROC::roc(y_cls_test, p_fund, quiet=TRUE)

roc_df <- bind_rows(
  tibble(
    FPR   = 1 - roc_fe$specificities,
    TPR   = roc_fe$sensitivities,
    Model = paste0("FE Logit (AUC=", round(auc(roc_fe),3), ")")
  ),
  tibble(
    FPR   = 1 - roc_fund$specificities,
    TPR   = roc_fund$sensitivities,
    Model = paste0("Fundamentals (AUC=", round(auc(roc_fund),3), ")")
  )
)

ggplot(roc_df, aes(x=FPR, y=TPR, colour=Model)) +
  geom_line(linewidth=1.2) +
  geom_abline(slope=1, intercept=0, linetype="dashed", colour="grey60") +
  scale_colour_manual(values=c(pal_main[1], pal_main[3]), name=NULL) +
  labs(
    title    = "ROC Curves — Discount Probability Models",
    subtitle = "Higher AUC = better discrimination between discounted and non-discounted listings",
    x = "False Positive Rate (1 - Specificity)",
    y = "True Positive Rate (Sensitivity)",
    caption  = "Dashed line = random classifier | Use best model to score inbound acquisition leads"
  )
```

```{r discount_by_zona_logit, fig.width=13, fig.height=7}
# ── 11F. Predicted discount probability by zona ────────────
# Scenario: "typical" property (medians + reference factor levels)
typical_prop <- tibble(
  metros10    = median(train_cls$metros10,  na.rm=TRUE),
  rooms_cap   = median(train_cls$rooms_cap, na.rm=TRUE),
  banos_imp   = median(train_cls$banos_imp, na.rm=TRUE),
  banos_miss  = 0.0,
  lift_f      = factor("No", levels=levels(train_cls$lift_f)),
  floor_grp   = factor("BAJO", levels=levels(train_cls$floor_grp)),
  pop_density = median(train_cls$pop_density, na.rm=TRUE),
  inhabitants = median(train_cls$inhabitants, na.rm=TRUE),
  area_km2    = median(train_cls$area_km2, na.rm=TRUE),
  parks       = median(train_cls$parks,    na.rm=TRUE),
  museums     = median(train_cls$museums,  na.rm=TRUE),
  libraries   = median(train_cls$libraries,na.rm=TRUE),
  schools     = median(train_cls$schools,  na.rm=TRUE)
)

zona_discount_grid <- tibble(zona = levels(train_cls$zona)) |>
  crossing(typical_prop) |>
  mutate(
    p_discount = predict(m_cls_fe, newdata=cur_data(), type="response")
  ) |>
  left_join(market_benchmarks |> select(zona, district_label), by="zona") |>
  mutate(zona_lbl = coalesce(district_label, zona)) |>
  left_join(portfolio_by_zona |> select(zona, portfolio_n), by="zona") |>
  mutate(
    portfolio_n       = replace_na(portfolio_n, 0L),
    portfolio_present = portfolio_n > 0
  ) |>
  arrange(desc(p_discount))

ggplot(zona_discount_grid,
       aes(x=reorder(zona_lbl, p_discount), y=p_discount,
           fill=portfolio_present)) +
  geom_col(width=0.7) +
  geom_text(aes(label=paste0(scales::percent(p_discount, accuracy=0.1),
                              if_else(portfolio_present,  " ★",""))),
            hjust=-0.08, size=3.0) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values=c("TRUE"=pal_main[1], "FALSE"=pal_main[4]),
    labels=c("TRUE"="Portfolio active ★","FALSE"="Not in portfolio"),
    name=NULL
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels=scales::percent,
                     expand=expansion(mult=c(0,0.18))) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title    = "Predicted P(Discount) for Typical Property — By Zona",
    subtitle = "FE logit model | Typical property = median structural features",
    x = NULL, y = "Predicted probability of price discount",
    caption  = "High P(discount) zones are where sellers are most likely to reduce prices — prime acquisition sweet spot"
  )
```

```{r odds_ratios, fig.width=12, fig.height=7}
# ── 11G. Odds ratios — what drives discounting? ────────────
or_df <- tidy(m_cls_fe, exponentiate=TRUE, conf.int=TRUE) |>
  filter(!str_starts(term, "zona"), term != "(Intercept)") |>
  mutate(
    term_lbl = recode(term,
      "metros10"           = "Size (+10 m²)",
      "rooms_cap"          = "Rooms (+1)",
      "banos_imp"          = "Bathrooms (+1)",
      "banos_missTRUE"     = "Bathrooms missing",
      "lift_fSi"           = "Lift: Yes",
      "lift_fMissing"      = "Lift: Missing",
      "floor_grpSOTANO"    = "Floor: Basement",
      "floor_grpENTRESUELO"= "Floor: Mezzanine",
      "floor_grp1"         = "Floor: 1st",
      "floor_grp2"         = "Floor: 2nd",
      "floor_grp3"         = "Floor: 3rd",
      "floor_grp4"         = "Floor: 4th",
      "floor_grp5+"        = "Floor: 5th+",
      "floor_grpATICO"     = "Floor: Penthouse"
    ),
    sig = p.value < 0.05
  )

ggplot(or_df,
       aes(x=reorder(term_lbl, estimate), y=estimate,
           ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, colour=sig)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=1, linetype="dashed", colour="grey60") +
  geom_pointrange(size=0.8) +
  scale_colour_manual(
    values=c("FALSE"="grey70","TRUE"=pal_main[3]),
    labels=c("Not significant","p<0.05"),
    name=NULL
  ) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title    = "Odds Ratios — Drivers of Price Discounting",
    subtitle = "OR > 1 = increases P(discount) | OR < 1 = decreases P(discount) | Ref: ground floor, no lift",
    x = NULL, y = "Odds ratio (95% CI)",
    caption  = "Insight: identify which property characteristics predict a seller will reduce their asking price"
  )
```
